summary: Audio takes too long to start from USB
description:
Problem:
When switching to USB audio source, there is a noticeable delay before audio starts. Feels slower than previous software version.
Steps to reproduce:
- 1. Insert USB drive with audio content
- 2. Wait for USB to be recognized
- 3. Tap USB source in media menu
- 4. Use stopwatch to measure time until audio plays
- 5. Repeat 10 times and average
Expected result:
Audio should start within 200ms of selecting USB source.
Actual result:
Audio takes 350-400ms on average to start. This is noticeable to user and feels sluggish.
